calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Jul-22-2008 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: 9:12am
Cause called for Small Claims Appeal. Judge Pro Tem Sharon O'Grady presiding, clerk-Beth Wilber, Dept. 525:
Appellant, Edmund Bondoc, appears through counsel, Rodel E. Rodis, Esq.; Respondent, Alexander Losov, appears in Pro Per. Appearing with Mr. Losov is Demitry Evenkov, who serves as the informal Russian translator for Mr. Losov. Parties and witnesses are swonr. Parties then present their respective cases. Judge O'Grady has some questions for the parties.
EXHA(1) Photo of Respondent's car license number.
EXHa(2) Copy of cell phone record
Mr. Rodis calls witnesses for the Appellant:
KATHEREN GILLMAN S/E
EDMUNDO DONDOC, SR. S/E

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar May-09-2008 Judgment Entered

DEFENDANT'S CLAIM
